      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.9b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R&=\\sigma(A,z)\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\left[\\sigma_{A}^{2}+\\sigma(E,A)\\right]\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)(\\beta_{z}+\\beta_{E})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

      {

        "latex": "h^{2}\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\beta_{z}=\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{z}=h^{2}\\left[S-\\left(\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}\\right)\\right]",

        "latex": "R=h^{2}S+\\sigma_{A}^{2}(1-h^{2})\\beta_{A}-h^{2}\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}+\\sigma(E,A)\\left[\\beta_{z}-h^{2}\\beta_{A}+(1-h^{2})\\beta_{E}\\right]",

        "latex": "R=h^{2}S=\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}\\sigma(z,w)=\\sigma(A_{z},w)",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.19b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}b_{z}=\\frac{\\sigma(w,z)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)+\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}\\\\&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}h^{2}+\\frac{\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(E)}(1-h^{2})\\\\&=b_{A}h^{2}+b_{E}(1-h^{2})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.19b",

        ]
      },
      {

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {

        "latex": "\\frac{\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})+\\sigma(E_{z},e_{w})+\\sigma(A_{z},e_{w})+\\sigma(E_{z},A_{w})}{\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})+\\sigma^{2}(E_{z})}=\\frac{\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})+\\sigma(A_{z},e_{w})}{\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})}",

        "label": "Formula 20.21b",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.22a",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}=\\mathbf{X}\\boldsymbol{\\beta}+\\mathbf{Z}_{a}\\mathbf{a}+\\sum_{i=1}^{k}\\mathbf{Z}_{i}\\mathbf{u}_{i}+\\mathbf{e}",

        "label": "Formula 20.22b",

        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23b",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x y}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{x y}=\\frac{2}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}S_{x y,\\ell}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23b",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23c",
        "latex": "E[S_{x y,\\ell}]=\\theta_{x y}+(1-\\theta_{x y})s_{\\ell}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23c",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

        "position": 57,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23d",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{S_{xy,\\ell}-s_{\\ell}}{1-s_{\\ell}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23d",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23e",
        "latex": "S_{xy}=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}S_{xy,\\ell}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23f",
        "latex": "E[S_{xy}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}E[S_{xy,\\ell}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}[\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})s_\\ell]=L\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_\\ell",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23g",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}_{x y,D W}=\\frac{S_{x y}-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}{L-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23g",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23h",
        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",

        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

        "position": 62,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Pr",
          "b",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 63,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 64,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "T",
          "\\mathrm{c}",
          "\\mathrm{o}",
          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23k",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23k",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 65,
        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23m",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x x}=1+\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{T_{x,\\ell}^{2}-(1+2p_{\\ell})T_{x,\\ell}+2p_{\\ell}^{2}}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23m",

        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",

        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_20.231",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{xy}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{\\left(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\quad for x\\neq y",

        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma(w,z)\\\\\\sigma(w,A)\\\\\\sigma(w,E)\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}S\\\\\\boldsymbol{R}\\\\\\sigma(w,E)\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma_{z}^{2}&\\sigma(z,A)&\\sigma(z,E)\\\\\\sigma(z,A)&\\sigma_{A}^{2}&\\sigma(E,A)\\\\\\sigma(z,E)&\\sigma(E,A)&\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\beta_{z}\\\\\\beta_{A}\\\\\\beta_{E}\\end{pmatrix}",

        "latex": "\\sigma(z,A)=\\sigma(A+E+e_{s},A)=\\sigma_{A}^{2}+\\sigma(E,A)",

      },

        "id": "formula_20.9a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}S&=\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\beta_{z}+\\sigma(z,A)\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(z,E)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\beta_{z}+\\left[\\sigma_{A}^{2}+\\sigma(E,A)\\right]\\beta_{A}+\\left[\\sigma_{E}^{2}+\\sigma(E,A)\\right]\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}+\\sigma(E,A)(\\beta_{A}+\\beta_{E})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "subsection": "Complications in the Absence of Environmental Change",

        "symbols_defined": [

        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R&=\\sigma(A,z)\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\left[\\sigma_{A}^{2}+\\sigma(E,A)\\right]\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)(\\beta_{z}+\\beta_{E})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}b_{z}=\\frac{\\sigma(w,z)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)+\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}\\\\&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}h^{2}+\\frac{\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(E)}(1-h^{2})\\\\&=b_{A}h^{2}+b_{E}(1-h^{2})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}_{x y,D W}=\\frac{S_{x y}-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}{L-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23g",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 61,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "D",
          "W",
          "\\widehat{\\theta}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23h",
        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23h",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 62,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Pr",
          "b",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 63,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 64,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "T",
          "\\mathrm{c}",
          "\\mathrm{o}",
          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23k",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23k",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 65,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "T",
          "\\mathrm{c}",
          "\\mathrm{o}",
          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23m",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x x}=1+\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{T_{x,\\ell}^{2}-(1+2p_{\\ell})T_{x,\\ell}+2p_{\\ell}^{2}}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23m",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 66,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widehat{A}",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.231",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{xy}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{\\left(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\quad for x\\neq y",
        "label": "Formula 20.231",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 67,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widehat{A}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24a",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})-2\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)+\\sigma^{2}(A)=\\sigma^{2}(A)-\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})",
        "label": "Formula 20.24a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 68,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\epsilon",
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24b",
        "latex": "\\rho=\\frac{\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(A)}}=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 69,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\rho"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24c",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})=\\rho^{2}\\sigma^{2}(A)",
        "label": "Formula 20.24c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 70,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma",
          "\\widehat{a}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24d",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 71,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\operatorname",

          "c",
          "o",
          "r",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24e",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\left(1-\\rho^{2}\\right)\\sigma^{2}(A)",
        "label": "Formula 20.24e",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 72,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24f",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma(\\widehat{a},E)=\\left(1-\\rho^{2}\\right)\\sigma^{2}(A)",
        "label": "Formula 20.24f",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 73,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24g",

        "label": "Formula 20.24g",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 74,

      },

        "label": "Formula 20.25a",

        "position": 76,

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.25b",
        "latex": "b_{\\hat{a}}=\\frac{\\sigma(w,\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}=\\frac{h^{2}\\sigma(w,z)}{\\rho^{2}h^{2}\\sigma^{2}(z)}=\\frac{b_{z}}{\\rho^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.25b",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 77,

      {

        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}_{j}=\\mathbf{X}_{j}\\mathbf{b}_{j}+\\mathbf{Z}_{j}\\mathbf{a}_{j}+\\mathbf{e}_{j}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 79,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.26b",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{j}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{j}\\end{pmatrix}\\sim\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}\\end{pmatrix},\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{j})\\mathbf{A}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\sigma^{2}(e_{j})\\mathbf{I}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27a",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{y}_{1}\\\\\\mathbf{y}_{2}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{z}\\\\\\mathbf{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{X}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{X}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{b}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{b}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{Z}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{Z}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 81,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{y}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27b",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\left(\\mathbf{a}\\right)=\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{z})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\\\ \\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 82,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\boldsymbol",
          "\\mathbf{a}",
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27c",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{G}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})&\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(A_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

Similarly, the covariance structure for the stacked vectors of residuals is $$ \\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad\\mathbf{E}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(e_{z})&\\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(e_{w})\\end{pmatrix} $$ (20.27d)"

label: Formula 20.27e
section: APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS
subsection: Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $
nearby_text: By construction $ \sigma(A_{z}, e_{z}) = \sigma(A_{w}, e_{w}) = 0 $, while the standard assumption is $ \sigma(A_{z}, e_{w}) = \sigma(A_{w}, e_{z}) = 0 $, yielding an assumed covariance structure of $$ \sigma\begin{pmatrix}{{{\mathbf{a}_{z}}}} \\{{{\mathbf{a}_{w}}}} \\{{{\mathbf{e}_{z}}}} \\{{{\mathbf{e}_{w}}}}\end{pmatrix}=\begin{pmatrix}{{{\mathbf{G}\otimes\mathbf{A}}}}&{{{\mathbf{0}}}} \\{{{\mathbf{0}}}}&{{{\mathbf{E}\otimes\mathbf{I}}}}\end{pmatrix} $$ (20.27e)

        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",

        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})-2\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)+\\sigma^{2}(A)=\\sigma^{2}(A)-\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})",

        "latex": "\\rho=\\frac{\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(A)}}=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}}",

        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24d",

        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}_{j}=\\mathbf{X}_{j}\\mathbf{b}_{j}+\\mathbf{Z}_{j}\\mathbf{a}_{j}+\\mathbf{e}_{j}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 79,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_20.26b",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{j}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{j}\\end{pmatrix}\\sim\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}\\end{pmatrix},\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{j})\\mathbf{A}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\sigma^{2}(e_{j})\\mathbf{I}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 80,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_20.27a",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{y}_{1}\\\\\\mathbf{y}_{2}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{z}\\\\\\mathbf{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{X}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{X}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{b}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{b}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{Z}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{Z}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 81,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]

      {
        "id": "formula_20.27b",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\left(\\mathbf{a}\\right)=\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{z})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\\\ \\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_20.27c",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{G}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})&\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(A_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27d",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad\\mathbf{E}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(e_{z})&\\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(e_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27d",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 84,

  "nearby_text": "By construction $ \\sigma(A_{z}, e_{z}) = \\sigma(A_{w}, e_{w}) = 0 $, while the standard assumption is $ \\sigma(A_{z}, e_{w}) = \\sigma(A_{w}, e_{z}) = 0 $, yielding an assumed covariance structure of $$ \\sigma\\begin{pmatrix}{{{\\mathbf{a}_{z}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{a}_{w}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{e}_{z}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{e}_{w}}}}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}{{{\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}}}}&{{{\\mathbf{0}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{0}}}}&{{{\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I}}}}\\end{pmatrix} $$ (20.27e)"
}

label: Formula 20.28a
section: APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS
subsection: Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $
nearby_text: example, $ \sigma(A_z, A_w) $ is the expected selection response under the 1968 version of Robertson's theorem (Equation 6.24a). From the assumption that $ \sigma(A_z, e_w) = \sigma(A_w, e_z) = 0 $, $$ S_{z}=\sigma(z,w)=\sigma(A_{z}+e_{z},A_{w}+e_{w})=\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})+\sigma(e_{z},e_{w}) $$ (20.28a) is a direct estimate of the selection differential on the phenotypic value $ (z) $ of the focal trait, while $$ S_{A}=\sigma(A_{z},w)=\sigma(A_{z},A_{w}+e_{w})=\sigma(A_{z},A_{w}) $$ (20.28b) is an e

        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",

        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",

        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",

        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",

        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}_{j}=\\mathbf{X}_{j}\\mathbf{b}_{j}+\\mathbf{Z}_{j}\\mathbf{a}_{j}+\\mathbf{e}_{j}",

        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\left(\\mathbf{a}\\right)=\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{z})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\\\ \\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}",

        "latex": "h^{2}\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\beta_{z}=\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{z}=h^{2}\\left[S-\\left(\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}\\right)\\right]",

        "latex": "R=h^{2}S+\\sigma_{A}^{2}(1-h^{2})\\beta_{A}-h^{2}\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}+\\sigma(E,A)\\left[\\beta_{z}-h^{2}\\beta_{A}+(1-h^{2})\\beta_{E}\\right]",

        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}b_{z}=\\frac{\\sigma(w,z)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)+\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}\\\\&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}h^{2}+\\frac{\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(E)}(1-h^{2})\\\\&=b_{A}h^{2}+b_{E}(1-h^{2})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "E[S_{xy}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}E[S_{xy,\\ell}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}[\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})s_\\ell]=L\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_\\ell",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23h",
        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23k",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",

        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})-2\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)+\\sigma^{2}(A)=\\sigma^{2}(A)-\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.24b",
        "latex": "\\rho=\\frac{\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(A)}}=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}}",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24d",

        "id": "formula_20.23h",
        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23h",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 62,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Pr",
          "b",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 63,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 64,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "T",
          "\\mathrm{c}",
          "\\mathrm{o}",
          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23k",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23k",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 65,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "T",
          "\\mathrm{c}",
          "\\mathrm{o}",
          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23m",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x x}=1+\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{T_{x,\\ell}^{2}-(1+2p_{\\ell})T_{x,\\ell}+2p_{\\ell}^{2}}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23m",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 66,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\widehat{A}",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.231",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{xy}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{\\left(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\quad for x\\neq y",
        "label": "Formula 20.231",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 67,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "x",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24a",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})-2\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)+\\sigma^{2}(A)=\\sigma^{2}(A)-\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})",
        "label": "Formula 20.24a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 68,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\epsilon",
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24b",
        "latex": "\\rho=\\frac{\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(A)}}=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 69,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\rho"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24c",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})=\\rho^{2}\\sigma^{2}(A)",
        "label": "Formula 20.24c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 70,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma",
          "\\widehat{a}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24d",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 71,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "z"
        ]
      },
      {

        "label": "Formula 20.24e",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 72,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },

        "label": "Formula 20.24f",

        "symbols_defined": [

      },

        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}_{j}=\\mathbf{X}_{j}\\mathbf{b}_{j}+\\mathbf{Z}_{j}\\mathbf{a}_{j}+\\mathbf{e}_{j}",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.26b",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{j}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{j}\\end{pmatrix}\\sim\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}\\end{pmatrix},\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{j})\\mathbf{A}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\sigma^{2}(e_{j})\\mathbf{I}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27a",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{y}_{1}\\\\\\mathbf{y}_{2}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{z}\\\\\\mathbf{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{X}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{X}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{b}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{b}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{Z}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{Z}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 81,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{y}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27b",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\left(\\mathbf{a}\\right)=\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{z})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\\\ \\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

      },
      {

        "latex": "\\mathbf{G}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})&\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(A_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27d",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad\\mathbf{E}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(e_{z})&\\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(e_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27d",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        "label": "Formula 20.27e",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

        "label": "Formula 20.28a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

}

label: Formula 20.29b

        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",

        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",

        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",

        "id": "formula_20.9b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}R&=\\sigma(A,z)\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\left[\\sigma_{A}^{2}+\\sigma(E,A)\\right]\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)\\beta_{E}\\\\&=\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{z}+\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma(E,A)(\\beta_{z}+\\beta_{E})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.9b",

        "latex": "h^{2}\\sigma_{z}^{2}\\beta_{z}=\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{z}=h^{2}\\left[S-\\left(\\sigma_{A}^{2}\\beta_{A}+\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}\\right)\\right]",

        "latex": "R=h^{2}S+\\sigma_{A}^{2}(1-h^{2})\\beta_{A}-h^{2}\\sigma_{E}^{2}\\beta_{E}+\\sigma(E,A)\\left[\\beta_{z}-h^{2}\\beta_{A}+(1-h^{2})\\beta_{E}\\right]",

        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}b_{z}=\\frac{\\sigma(w,z)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)+\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(z)}\\\\&=\\frac{\\sigma(w,A)}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}h^{2}+\\frac{\\sigma(w,E)}{\\sigma^{2}(E)}(1-h^{2})\\\\&=b_{A}h^{2}+b_{E}(1-h^{2})\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x y}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{x y}=\\frac{2}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}S_{x y,\\ell}",

        "id": "formula_20.23f",
        "latex": "E[S_{xy}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}E[S_{xy,\\ell}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}[\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})s_\\ell]=L\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_\\ell",

        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}_{x y,D W}=\\frac{S_{x y}-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}{L-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23h",
        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",

        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23k",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23k",

        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x x}=1+\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{T_{x,\\ell}^{2}-(1+2p_{\\ell})T_{x,\\ell}+2p_{\\ell}^{2}}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",

        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{xy}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{\\left(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\quad for x\\neq y",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.24a",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})-2\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)+\\sigma^{2}(A)=\\sigma^{2}(A)-\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24b",
        "latex": "\\rho=\\frac{\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(A)}}=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24b",

      {
        "id": "formula_20.24c",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})=\\rho^{2}\\sigma^{2}(A)",

        "symbols_defined": [

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24d",

        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}_{j}=\\mathbf{X}_{j}\\mathbf{b}_{j}+\\mathbf{Z}_{j}\\mathbf{a}_{j}+\\mathbf{e}_{j}",

        "label": "Formula 20.26b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

        "label": "Formula 20.27a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        ]

        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23c",
        "latex": "E[S_{x y,\\ell}]=\\theta_{x y}+(1-\\theta_{x y})s_{\\ell}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23c",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23d",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{S_{xy,\\ell}-s_{\\ell}}{1-s_{\\ell}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23d",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23e",
        "latex": "S_{xy}=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}S_{xy,\\ell}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23e",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",

      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23f",
        "latex": "E[S_{xy}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}E[S_{xy,\\ell}]=\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}[\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})s_\\ell]=L\\theta_{xy}+(1-\\theta_{xy})\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_\\ell",
        "label": "Formula 20.23f",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23g",
        "latex": "\\widehat{\\theta}_{x y,D W}=\\frac{S_{x y}-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}{L-\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}s_{\\ell}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23g",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 61,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "\\widehat{\\theta}",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23h",
        "latex": "\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)=\\theta_{x y}p_{\\ell}+(1-\\theta_{x y})p_{\\ell}^{2}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23h",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 62,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\Pr",
          "b",
          "x"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23i",
        "latex": "\\theta_{xy}=\\frac{\\Pr(b_{x,\\ell}=b_{y,\\ell}=1)-p_{\\ell}^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{E[b_{x,\\ell}b_{y,\\ell}]-(E[b_{\\ell}])^{2}}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell})\\sigma(b_{y,\\ell})}=\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})",
        "label": "Formula 20.23i",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 63,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\theta",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23j",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})}{\\sigma(T_{x,\\ell})\\cdot\\sigma(T_{y,\\ell})}=\\frac{(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell})\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23j",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 64,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "T",
          "\\mathrm{c}",
          "\\mathrm{o}",
          "\\mathrm{r}",
          "x",
          "y"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23k",
        "latex": "\\mathrm{corr}(T_{x,\\ell},T_{y,\\ell})=\\frac{4\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}=2\\left[\\frac{\\sigma(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})}{p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\right]=2\\mathrm{corr}(b_{x,\\ell},b_{y,\\ell})=2\\theta_{xy}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23k",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 65,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.23m",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{x x}=1+\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{T_{x,\\ell}^{2}-(1+2p_{\\ell})T_{x,\\ell}+2p_{\\ell}^{2}}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}",
        "label": "Formula 20.23m",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",

        "symbols_defined": [

      {
        "id": "formula_20.231",
        "latex": "\\widehat{A}_{xy}=2\\widehat{\\theta}_{xy}=\\frac{1}{L}\\sum_{\\ell=1}^{L}\\frac{\\left(T_{x,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)\\left(T_{y,\\ell}-2p_{\\ell}\\right)}{2p_{\\ell}(1-p_{\\ell})}\\quad for x\\neq y",
        "label": "Formula 20.231",
        "section": "Selection Response in Natural Populations: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Obtaining the Relationship Matrix: Marker Data",
        "position": 67,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24a",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\epsilon)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a}-A)=\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})-2\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)+\\sigma^{2}(A)=\\sigma^{2}(A)-\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})",
        "label": "Formula 20.24a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 68,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\epsilon",
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24b",
        "latex": "\\rho=\\frac{\\sigma(\\widehat{a},A)}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(A)}}=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})}{\\sigma^{2}(A)}}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 69,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\rho"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24c",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})=\\rho^{2}\\sigma^{2}(A)",
        "label": "Formula 20.24c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 70,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\sigma",
          "\\widehat{a}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.24d",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(\\widehat{a},z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(\\widehat{a})\\sigma^{2}(z)}}\\\\&=\\frac{\\left|\\sigma(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho\\sqrt{\\sigma^{2}(A)\\sigma^{2}(z)}}=\\frac{\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|}{\\rho}\\geq\\left|\\operatorname{corr}(A,z)\\right|\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 20.24d",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Consistency Tests: Accuracy, Reliability, and Caveats when Using PBVs",
        "position": 71,

      {

        "label": "Formula 20.24e",

      },
      {

      {

        "label": "Formula 20.25a",

      {

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.26a",
        "latex": "\\mathbf{y}_{j}=\\mathbf{X}_{j}\\mathbf{b}_{j}+\\mathbf{Z}_{j}\\mathbf{a}_{j}+\\mathbf{e}_{j}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.26b",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{j}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{j}\\end{pmatrix}\\sim\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}\\end{pmatrix},\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{j})\\mathbf{A}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\sigma^{2}(e_{j})\\mathbf{I}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.26b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 80,
        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27a",
        "latex": "\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{y}_{1}\\\\\\mathbf{y}_{2}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{z}\\\\\\mathbf{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{X}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{X}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{b}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{b}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{Z}_{z}&\\mathbf{0}\\\\\\mathbf{0}&\\mathbf{Z}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}+\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\\\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",
        "position": 81,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{y}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27b",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\left(\\mathbf{a}\\right)=\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{a}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{z})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\\\ \\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},A_{w})\\mathbf{A}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}^{2}(A_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27b",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

      {

        "latex": "\\mathbf{G}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(A_{z})&\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(A_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27c",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        "symbols_defined": [
          "\\mathbf{G}"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27d",
        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I},\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad\\mathbf{E}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\sigma^{2}(e_{z})&\\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})\\\\ \\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})&\\sigma^{2}(e_{w})\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27d",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_20.27e",
        "latex": "\\sigma\\begin{pmatrix}{{{\\mathbf{a}_{z}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{a}_{w}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{e}_{z}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{e}_{w}}}}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}{{{\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}}}}&{{{\\mathbf{0}}}} \\\\{{{\\mathbf{0}}}}&{{{\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I}}}}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.27e",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",
        "subsection": "Bivariate Animal Models: REML Estimates of $ \\sigma(A_{z}, A_{w}), S_{A} $, and $ S_{z} $",

      {

        "latex": "S_{z}=\\sigma(z,w)=\\sigma(A_{z}+e_{z},A_{w}+e_{w})=\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})+\\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})",

        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

      {

        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

      {

        "latex": "\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{a}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{a}_{w}\\\\ \\mathbf{e}_{z}\\\\ \\mathbf{e}_{w}\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{G}\\otimes\\mathbf{A}&\\mathbf{C}\\\\ \\mathbf{C}^{T}&\\mathbf{E}\\otimes\\mathbf{I}\\end{pmatrix}",
        "label": "Formula 20.29a",
        "section": "APPLYING MIXED MODELS TO NATURAL POPULATIONS",

      {

        "latex": "\\mathbf{C}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(\\mathbf{a}_{z},\\mathbf{e}_{z})&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(\\mathbf{a}_{z},\\mathbf{e}_{w})\\\\\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(\\mathbf{a}_{w},\\mathbf{e}_{z})&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(\\mathbf{a}_{w},\\mathbf{e}_{w})\\end{pmatrix}=\\begin{pmatrix}\\mathbf{0}&\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{z},e_{w})\\mathbf{A}\\\\\\boldsymbol{\\sigma}(A_{w},e_{z})\\mathbf{A}&\\mathbf{0}\\end{pmatrix}",

      {

  "nearby_text": "'s test (Equation 20.18), the phenotypic and breeding-value selection differentials now become $$ S_{z}=\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})+\\sigma(e_{z},e_{w})+\\sigma(A_{z},e_{w})+\\sigma(A_{w},e_{z}) $$ (20.29c) and $$ S_{A}=\\sigma(A_{z},A_{w})+\\sigma(A_{z},e_{w}) $$ (20.29d)"
